title: Evangelion Expo in China
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Expo in China             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Sep 06, 2013 12:39 pm Not sure exactly what this is but it's looking very official: http://www.scla.com.cn/eva/ready.aspx It's different than the Eva Exhibit that'll be traveling around Japan because all of that material will be in Fukuoka while the Eva Expo in China takes place.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Sep 06, 2013 7:08 pm That company appears to be involved with some other anime and not just Eva (http://www.scla.com.cn/). There is this Eva specific section on the site: http://www.scla.com.cn/eva/tour-cn.html.

[]: EVA Expo             Quote Post by iihieiii » Thu Oct 03, 2013 9:51 pm [url]http://evangelionbr.wordpress.com/2013/10/03/eva-expo-em-shangai/[/url] Sup =) So... Who is going to cover this event ? We got storyboards, layouts, concepts art, etc... Please Lillith....say that someone on this forum lives in shangai LOL

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Oct 03, 2013 10:42 pm It's unlikely to have anything that hasn't already been seen at previous Japanese exhibits or CRCs. Another thread for mods to fiddle together: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15181/Evangelion-Expo-in-China/

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Oct 04, 2013 11:15 am Had no idea Eva was big enough in China to justify a 2 week exhibit in Shanghai. Then again I don't know how big anime is over there in general. Never set foot in a music or video store when I visited in 2007 and 2008.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Oct 05, 2014 8:13 am 2.0 http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3314.html
